title: RESTORE - 211info
text: BENTON HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and gently used home improvement products and building materials. Accepts donations of new and gently used items in working condition. Does not accept donations of beds, chemicals, or clothing. Serves as a collection site for PaintCare and E-cycles. 4840 SW Philomath Boulevard Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Email (541) 752-6637 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 752-6637 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call to schedule a donation pick-up. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, Linn, and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of SW Philomath Boulevard and Technology Loop Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
